title: euonymus radicans var. angustifolius
intro: Euonymus radicans var. angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved running strawberry tree or running euonymus, is a woody climber native to Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Euonymus radicans var. angustifolius include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
